topics.label: Design Secure Architectures
topics.description: Designing access controls, network security, and data protection using IAM, VPC, KMS, and AWS security services. Covers identity and resource policies, encryption strategies, and threat detection.

studyPointers.label: VPC Security: Security Groups and NACLs

examScenarios.title: Restrict S3 access to a specific VPC
examScenarios.prompt: A company wants to ensure that an S3 bucket is only accessible from EC2 instances in a specific VPC and not over the public internet. Design the access control.
examScenarios.focus: VPC endpoints for S3, endpoint policies, bucket policies with aws:SourceVpc condition

examScenarios.title: Rotate database credentials automatically
examScenarios.prompt: An application stores RDS credentials in environment variables on EC2 instances. The security team requires automatic rotation without application code changes.
examScenarios.focus: AWS Secrets Manager rotation, IAM role for EC2, Secrets Manager SDK integration

topics.label: Design Resilient Architectures
topics.description: Building highly available and fault-tolerant systems using multi-AZ and multi-Region patterns, load balancing, auto scaling, managed database services, and asynchronous decoupling.

examScenarios.title: Design a multi-AZ web tier
examScenarios.prompt: A web application must survive the loss of an Availability Zone with zero downtime. Design the compute and load balancing layers.
examScenarios.focus: ALB with cross-zone load balancing, Auto Scaling groups spanning multiple AZs, health checks

examScenarios.title: Decouple a synchronous processing pipeline
examScenarios.prompt: An order processing system becomes slow when the downstream fulfillment service is overwhelmed. Redesign to prevent backpressure from affecting order submission.
examScenarios.focus: SQS for decoupling, producer/consumer pattern, visibility timeout, dead-letter queues

topics.label: Design High-Performing Architectures
topics.description: Selecting and sizing compute, storage, database, and network resources for performance. Covers caching strategies, content delivery, database read scaling, and data streaming.

studyPointers.label: Amazon Kinesis Data Streams Developer Guide

examScenarios.title: Reduce read latency for a global application
examScenarios.prompt: A read-heavy application with users across North America, Europe, and Asia Pacific has high database read latency. Design a solution to reduce query response times globally.
examScenarios.focus: RDS read replicas, ElastiCache, CloudFront for API caching, Global Accelerator

examScenarios.title: Handle a real-time clickstream at scale
examScenarios.prompt: A media platform generates millions of user click events per hour and needs to process them in near real-time for recommendations. Design the ingestion and processing layer.
examScenarios.focus: Kinesis Data Streams, shard capacity, Lambda consumers, Kinesis Data Firehose

topics.label: Design Cost-Optimized Architectures
topics.description: Reducing AWS spend through right-sizing, appropriate pricing models, storage tiering, serverless patterns, and using Cost Explorer and Trusted Advisor to identify savings.

examScenarios.title: Optimize EC2 spend for a steady-state workload
examScenarios.prompt: A company runs 20 EC2 instances continuously for a production application that has been stable for 18 months. Identify the most cost-effective purchasing strategy.
examScenarios.focus: Reserved Instances vs Savings Plans, commitment terms, convertible vs standard

examScenarios.title: Tier old log data to reduce storage costs
examScenarios.prompt: Application logs accumulate in S3 Standard. Logs older than 30 days are rarely accessed; logs older than 1 year are never accessed but must be retained for compliance.
examScenarios.focus: S3 lifecycle policies, S3-IA, S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval, S3 Glacier Deep Archive
